case_title: CATHY RILEY VS. BOSLEY INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $10.00 SERVED JAN-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOSLEY MEDICAL GROUP, A MEDICAL CORPORATION
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHEL.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RILEY, CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL GROUP, A MEDICAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-29-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-06-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT.506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM LEVER--WESTERN FIELD MANAGER. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THEIR CASE TODAY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL GROUP, A MEDICAL CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-05-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $10.00 SERVED JAN-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-29-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-10-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE INC. BOSLEY MEDICAL GROUP, A MEDICAL CORPORATION PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS, CSM-12-839526 AND CSM-11-839479, ARE, INFACT, ONE CLAIM, PROSECUTED AS TWO IN ORDER TO AVOID THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS OF SMALL CLAIM COURT. BECAUSE IT EXCEEDS THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS OF SMALL CLAIMS COURT, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO FILING IN THE PROPER COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $35.00 SERVED JAN-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOSLEY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JIM LEVER APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL -GRANTED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED BECAUSE: THE REQUEST DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE POSTPONEMENT. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
